flagged_claims.claim_text: Recent lab results are within normal limits
flagged_claims.source_evidence:
Glucose: 95 mg/dL
- Creatinine: 0.9 mg/dL
- Potassium: 4.2 mEq/L
flagged_claims.explanation: The source note lists raw lab values without explicitly characterizing them as 'within normal limits'; the normality interpretation is an inference not stated in the source, creating clinical ambiguity.

aegis_export.flawed_summary: 45-year-old male presenting for hypertension follow-up. Hypertension diagnosed 3 years ago, currently controlled on Enalapril 10mg/day and Aspirin 100mg/day. BP at visit: 128/82 mmHg, HR 72 bpm, weight 78 kg. Recent labs (1 month ago) within normal limits: glucose 95 mg/dL, creatinine 0.9 mg/dL, potassium 4.2 mEq/L. No known drug allergies. Plan: continue current treatment, low-sodium diet, and follow-up in 3 months.
